_meta.comment: English — Ko | Do · Vault. Flat dot-notation key structure per ADR D-036.

login.subtitle_default: Enter your master password to continue

login.forgot_help: Forgot password? Vault cannot be recovered.
login.destroy_dialog_body_3: the encrypted vault blob from this device. All data will be lost with no possibility of recovery.
login.destroy_dialog_warning: Use this only if you have forgotten your master password and want to start with a blank vault.

setup.intro_1: This password locks your entire vault. It
setup.intro_5: if you forget it. Choose something you will remember but no one else will guess.
setup.understood_1: I understand that if I forget this password, all data in the vault will be
biometric.enable_description: Unlock your vault with biometrics instead of typing your master password every time. Master is still required every 14 days.
biometric.confirm_description: When you confirm, the browser will request biometrics. Your master password is wrapped with a key only your device can generate.
biometric.login_button: Unlock with Touch ID / Face ID
change_master.title: Change master password
change_master.subtitle: The entire vault will be re-encrypted with the new key.
change_master.biometric_warning_1: Touch ID/Face ID is enabled on this device. It will be
change_master.biometric_warning_3: — you must re-register biometrics with the new password.
change_master.error_same_as_current: Must be different from current password
header.net_offline_tooltip: No network connection — changes cannot be saved
header.net_server_error_tooltip: Server not responding — check Upstash status
header.refresh_tooltip: Fetch latest vault data from server
header.packages_tooltip: Secure delivery — pack or unpack files
header.lock_tooltip: Lock vault — requires master password next time
dashboard.toggle_aria: Switch between passwords, cards and IDs
vault.empty_state_message: Add your first password. Everything is encrypted locally in your browser before it leaves your device — we never see plaintext.
toast.master_changed_with_biometric: Master password changed · Touch ID must be re-registered
toast.clipboard_clear_failed_full: Could not clear clipboard — switch focus to this tab and try again
toast.clipboard_clear_failed_short: Could not clear — switch focus to this tab and try again
event_log_clear.dialog_description: All server-side history (logins, changes, failed attempts) will be deleted. New events will be logged as normal afterwards.

event_log.footer_hint: Click a row to see full IP, User-Agent and ID.
package_hub.title: Secure delivery
package_hub.unpack_disabled: Coming in Iter 4 — unpack module is under construction.
package_preview.decode_failed: (Could not decode as text — using bytes)

pack.title: Pack files
pack.placeholder_name: Enter filename for the encrypted package
pack.name_hint_2: ) if the package should be as anonymous as possible. The filename is visible in plain text to the recipient.
pack.drop_zone_subtitle: or select using the buttons below
pack.pick_folder_title: Selects an entire folder recursively (including subfolders and files)
pack.tip_drag: Tip: You can drag both files and entire folders at once. The folder structure is preserved in the package and reconstructed for the recipient.
pack.overlimit_3: MB per container. Remove some files or split into multiple containers in the next step.
pack.containers_single_info_2: ) that splitting makes no sense. It will be encrypted as one container.
pack.tip_splitting_threshold: Tip: Splitting is offered only when the package exceeds 10 MB.
pack.containers_intro_3: ). Choose how many containers to split the package into.
pack.containers_independence_note: Each container is independent — the recipient can open one alone and see their files. The same password is used for all.
pack.password_intro: Choose a password. You can type your own (easy to dictate over the phone) or let the app generate a random strong one.
pack.error_min_8: Password must be at least 8 characters
pack.generated_note: Generated password — confirmation skipped. Click the field to change.
pack.warning_pwd_once_strong: The password will not be shown again.
pack.warning_pwd_rest: Send it via a secure channel — NOT in the same email as the file.
pack.warning_forever: The package lives forever with the recipient. It cannot be recalled.
pack.done_multi_1: containers are encrypted. Choose how you want to save them.
pack.done_single: The package is encrypted and downloaded.
pack.btn_pick_folder_title: Select one folder, all containers are written directly there
pack.btn_zip_all_title: Packs all containers into one ZIP file (without compression)
pack.completion_single: The encrypted package has been downloaded.
pack.completion_multi: The encrypted packages have been downloaded.
pack.recipient_step_1_b: file(s) by email or another channel
pack.recipient_step_2: Call and read the password over the phone (NOT the same channel as the file)
unpack.title: Unpack .kodoenc
unpack.error_wrong_password: Wrong password or corrupt file. Try again.
unpack.privacy_note: Ko | Do never sees your package. Everything happens in your browser.
unpack.placeholder_password: The password you received from the sender
unpack.master_pwd_warning_body: The package password is what the sender called and told you — not your own master password. Change the password and try again.
unpack.btn_pick_folder_title: Select one folder, all files are written directly there with preserved structure
unpack.btn_zip_all_title_with_folders: Preserves folder structure in one ZIP file
unpack.btn_zip_all_title: Packs all files into one ZIP file
unpack.completion_zip: The ZIP file has been downloaded.
unpack.recipient_warning: The package now lives with you. Delete it if you no longer need it — the sender cannot recall it.
lab.learn_length_body: A 20-character password with only lowercase letters has more entropy than a 10-character one with all character types. Increase length first, then consider character types.
lab.learn_patterns_body_suffix: and names of family/pets score low because attack tools try these first.
lab.learn_phrases_body_suffix: are easy to remember and mathematically strong.
lab.learn_kodo_title: Why Ko | Do · Vault is secure
lab.learn_kodo_body: The master password is run through PBKDF2 with 600,000 iterations → AES-256-GCM. Offline brute-force on one password takes about 100ms per attempt — so each extra character in your master password exposes the vault with many orders of magnitude less risk.
lab.learn_zxcvbn_body_1: Engine used by 1Password and Bitwarden. Checks against
lab.footer_privacy_note: Everything happens in your browser. Nothing is sent to the server.
vault.error_new_pwd_min_12: New password must be at least 12 characters
vault.error_new_pwd_must_differ: New password must be different from current
cards.error_master_pwd_unavailable: Master password not available — unlock vault again
ids.error_master_pwd_unavailable: Master password not available — unlock vault again
page.toast_unlock_for_cards_import: Unlock vault first to import cards only. (We need the current master password to keep all blobs in sync.)
page.toast_master_pwd_wrong: Today's master password is incorrect. Try again.
page.toast_mixed_passwords: Selected blobs are encrypted with different passwords ({labels}). Restore one blob at a time.
card_modal.compress_error_prefix: Compression failed — image was not saved.
card_modal.compress_error_fallback: Try again or skip the photo.
app.html_title: Ko | Do · Vault · Your digital keyring
pwd_warning.straight_rows: Keyboard rows are easy to guess
pwd_warning.short_keyboard: Short keyboard patterns are easy to guess
pwd_warning.repeats_short: Repetitions like "aaa" are easy to guess
pwd_warning.repeats_long: Repetitions like "abcabcabc" are only slightly harder than "abc"
pwd_warning.sequences: Sequences like abc or 6543 are easy to guess
pwd_warning.recent_years: Recent years are easy to guess
pwd_warning.dates: Dates are often easy to guess
pwd_warning.top10: This is one of the 10 most common passwords
pwd_warning.top100: This is one of the 100 most common passwords
pwd_warning.very_common: This is a very common password
pwd_warning.similar_common: Similar to a commonly used password
pwd_warning.single_word: A single word is easy to guess
pwd_warning.names: Names alone are easy to guess
pwd_warning.common_names: Common names are easy to guess
pwd_suggestion.use_words: Use multiple words, avoid common phrases
pwd_suggestion.no_need_symbols: You don't need symbols, numbers or capital letters — length beats complexity
pwd_suggestion.add_word: Add one or two more words. Unusual words are best.
pwd_suggestion.longer_keyboard: Use a longer keyboard pattern with more turns
pwd_suggestion.avoid_personal_dates: Avoid dates and years associated with you
pwd_suggestion.all_upper: All capitals is almost as easy as all lowercase
pwd_suggestion.reversed_words: Reversed words are not much harder to guess
pwd_suggestion.predictable_subs: Predictable substitutions like "@" instead of "a" help little
ids.error_too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
vault.error_too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
cards.error_too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
webauthn.error_not_supported: WebAuthn is not supported in this browser
webauthn.error_safari_focus_register: Safari could not open the Touch ID prompt because the document did not have focus. Close DevTools / other windows and try again.
webauthn.error_safari_focus_eval: Safari could not open the Touch ID prompt because the document did not have focus. Close DevTools / other windows and try again — or click once in the browser window before pressing Unlock.
webauthn.error_prf_unsupported: Touch ID / Face ID was registered, but your browser does not support the PRF extension required for encryption. Update your browser (Chrome 132+, Edge 132+, Safari 18+ / iOS 18+). On Android: make sure Google Password Manager is enabled.
webauthn.error_prf_eval_failed: PRF evaluation failed — the biometric credential cannot recreate the encryption key. Update your browser (Chrome 132+, Edge 132+, Safari 18+ / iOS 18+). On Android: ensure Google Password Manager is enabled in Android settings. You can delete the unused biometric entry and re-register.
webauthn.error_decrypt_failed: Could not decrypt master password with biometric key
package.error_password_min_8: Password must be at least 8 characters
package.error_payload_empty: Package cannot be empty — at least one file must be included
package.error_file_too_short: The file is too short to be a valid Ko | Do package
package.error_header_overflow: Package is corrupt (header-len exceeds file size)
package_zip.error_empty_container: Container must contain at least one file
package_zip.error_no_files_to_plan: Must have at least one file to plan containers

backup_import.subtitle_1: Choose which parts to restore. Selected blobs will

backup_import.mismatch_warning_1: The master password on the backup file is
backup_import.mismatch_warning_3: as today's master password. Backup data will be saved in your vault with your current master password.

ids.error_blob_mismatch: ID blob is encrypted with a different password than vault. Import backup or contact support.
camera.error_no_api: This browser does not support the camera API (getUserMedia missing).

camera.error_denied: You denied camera access. You can change this in browser settings, or save the card without a photo.
camera.error_not_found: No camera found on this device. You can save the card without a photo and add one later from a mobile or laptop.
camera.error_in_use: Camera is in use by another app. Close it and try again.

camera.finetune_tooltip: Crop manually to fine-tune the framing

settings.title: Settings
settings.action_change_master_desc: Re-encrypts all entries with new key
settings.action_remove_biometric_desc: Biometric credential is deleted from this device
settings.biometric_not_active_help: Touch ID is not enabled — you can enable it at the next unlock cycle on supported devices.
settings.action_export_desc: Download entire vault as encrypted JSON file
settings.action_import_desc: Replaces current vault — requires master password from backup
settings.backup_help: The backup file is AES-256-GCM encrypted. The master password is never included in the file and must be provided during recovery.
cards.empty_state_message: Add your first bank, credit or loyalty card. Everything is encrypted locally before it leaves your browser.
ids.empty_state_message: Passport, driver licence, ID card and health card in one safe place — always available when you need it.
settings.action_export_passwords_csv_des: Download all passwords in Bitwarden-compatible format for migration
export.step2_subtitle: Enter your master password to complete the export.
export.warning: This file is unencrypted. Delete it immediately after import.
export.confirm_plaintext: I understand that this file contains all my passwords in plaintext. I am responsible for deleting the file after use.
export.success_toast: Exported {N} passwords — remember to delete the file after import!

settings.action_activate_subscription_de: Unlock full access before the trial period ends
settings.bg_overlay_help: How much the background is dimmed. 0% = original, 80% = nearly black.

delete_account.gdpr_note: You have the right to erasure under GDPR art. 17. Stripe transaction history is retained for 5 years per Norwegian bookkeeping law.
delete_account.step2_body: Enter your master password to confirm deletion.
delete_account.error_generic: Could not delete vault. Try again, or contact support if the problem persists.

register.cancelled_failed: No money was charged. The subdomain will be released automatically within the hour. Pick a different one in the meantime if you'd like.
admin_tenants.delete_active_licenses: Cannot delete — there are active licenses under the prefix. Delete child tenants first.
admin_landing.jump_to_test_tooltip: Stub for plan selection (Iter 3) — wired to Stripe in Iter 11
platform_test.title: Ko | Do · Test
platform_test.subtitle: Plan picker (v4.3 Iter 3 stub)
platform_test.heading: Choose a plan
platform_test.intro: This is a stub for the B2C registration flow. Click a plan to see what gets recorded. No payment, no API calls — just a demo of the click-handling BEFORE Stripe is wired in at Iter 11.
platform_test.plan_trial_desc: Test all features for 30 days. No card required.
platform_test.plan_trial_bullet2: 30 days — then pick a plan or stop
platform_test.plan_monthly_desc: Full access, pay each month. Cancel anytime.
platform_test.plan_yearly_desc: Save 20 % — best value. Cancel before renewal.
platform_test.plan_yearly_bullet2: Cancel before renewal — refund within 14 days
platform_test.plan_enterprise_desc: Licenses for the whole team. Company admin manages users within purchased count.
platform_test.plan_enterprise_bullet1: Own company admin and license management
platform_test.plan_enterprise_bullet2: Invoice via email — monthly or yearly
platform_test.result_stub_note: This is a stub. In Iter 7+ clicking the plan button will redirect to /register?plan={planId}. In Iter 11 it gets wired to Stripe Checkout.
platform_test.result_stub_note_contact: This is a stub. The Enterprise flow is sales-driven — the contact button opens a mailto link with a pre-filled subject. No Stripe Checkout for Enterprise.
platform_test.iter4_intro: Type a subdomain below to see what /api/register/subdomain-check responds. The check runs 350ms after the last keystroke. This is the same endpoint the /register form will use in Iter 7+.
platform_test.iter4_hint: Type a name — the check runs automatically.

register.subheading: Fill in the form to start 30 days free. No card required.
register.field_locale: Choose language for email and communication from us
register.error_too_short: Subdomain must be at least 3 characters.
register.turnstile_error: Bot verification failed. Reload the page and try again.

register.api_error_internal_error: Something went wrong. Try again later.
register.lifecycle_label: Send me reminders about the trial period and payment status (recommended — you can change this in settings later).
register.transactional_note: We always send transactional messages — payment confirmations, receipts, and important notices about your vault. These cannot be turned off.
register.result_stub_note: This is a stub. In Iter 7+, POST /api/register will create the TenantRecord in central Upstash + provision a Vercel project + Upstash instance for {subdomain}.kodovault.no.
register.enterprise_body: The Enterprise flow is sales-driven. We set up licenses, billing, and the company admin together with you.

admin_landing.subtitle: Platform console (v4.3 Iter 1)
admin_tenants.detail_intro: All fields on the TenantRecord. Stored AES-256-GCM encrypted in central Upstash.
admin_tenants.empty_state: No tenants yet. Click "New tenant" to create the first one.
admin_tenants.confirm_delete_desc: You are permanently deleting '{subdomain}' from the central platform database. This cannot be undone. Type the subdomain below to confirm.

org_number.error_dk_mod11: Invalid Mod-11 checksum for Danish CVR.
org_number.error_se_length: Swedish org. number must be 10 digits.
org_number.error_se_luhn: Invalid Luhn checksum for Swedish org. number.
admin_tenants.error_locale_required: Select a language for the tenant before continuing.
admin_tenants.empty_filtered: No tenants match the filters. Reset to see all.

am_admin_change_password.subtitle_forced: You must change the temporary password before accessing the admin panel.
am_admin_change_password.subtitle_volunt: Choose a new strong password. Current password is required to confirm your identity.
am_admin_change_password.error_weak: New password is too weak or too short.
am_admin_change_password.error_same: New password must differ from the old one.
am_admin_mpw.heading: Master Password (optional)
am_admin_mpw.description: Encrypt admin notes and org backups with an extra password. The password never leaves your browser.
am_admin_mpw.none_hint: No Master Password has been configured for your organisation yet.
am_admin_mpw.unlocked_hint: MPW is active for this session. Admin notes and backup export can now be decrypted.
am_admin_mpw.setup_warning_body: MPW cannot be recovered. If you lose it, all encrypted admin notes and backups must be deleted to set up a new one.
am_admin_mpw.setup_understand: I understand that MPW cannot be recovered if I lose it.
am_admin_mpw.error_too_short: MPW must be at least 12 characters.
am_admin_mpw.error_too_weak: MPW is too weak — use a longer passphrase or more unique words (zxcvbn score must be ≥ 3).
am_admin_mpw.unlock_hint: Enter MPW to activate admin notes and backup export for this session.
am_admin_mpw.reset_warning_body:
All encrypted admin notes and backup data are lost forever.
The employee list and license info are kept, but notes must be written again.
You can create a new MPW after deletion.
am_admin.login_intro_no_prefix: Log in to manage employees in your company.
am_admin.login_network_error: Could not reach the server. Check your network connection.
am_admin.login_footer: Forgot your password? Contact a super-admin in your organization.
am_admin_billing.trial_expires_on_suffix: . Mike will send an invoice via Stripe as the period nears its end.
am_admin_billing.pre_expiry_body_suffix: . Renew your subscription in good time to avoid the accounts losing access.
am_admin_billing.grace_body_suffix: to pay before all employee accounts are locked and lose access. New invitations are temporarily disabled.
am_admin_billing.expired_title: Grace period is over — accounts lock at next check
am_admin_billing.expired_body_suffix: and the grace period has now expired. All employee accounts will be locked at the next cron check (within 24 hours). Pay the overdue invoice as soon as possible to restore access.
am_admin_billing.locked_body_prefix: All employee accounts are locked due to missing payment. Contact Mike (
am_admin_invites.heading: New employee
am_admin_invites.description: Create an invite — email is sent automatically if you fill in the email address
am_admin_invites.blocked_tooltip: Billing is overdue — pay before creating new invitations
am_admin_invites.blocked_message: New invitations are temporarily disabled because the invoice is overdue. Existing employees still work — pay the overdue invoice to reopen the invitation flow.
am_admin_invites.suffix_label: Subdomain part (only the employee's name — prefix is added automatically)
am_admin_invites.email_label: Email (recommended — sends the invite link automatically)
am_admin_invites.validation_error: The subdomain part must be 1–30 characters (a–z, 0–9, and hyphen in the middle).
am_admin_invites.success_without_email: ✓ Invite created — remember to send the link manually (email is missing or mail is disabled)
am_admin_employees.heading: Employees
am_admin_employees.empty_state: No employees or ongoing invitations. Create an invitation below to add the first employee.
am_admin_employees.confirm_delete_tenant:
permanently?

This deletes all data (passwords, cards, IDs) for this employee. The action cannot be undone.
send_invoice.heading: Send test invoice
send_invoice.description: Creates a Stripe invoice with per-seat price × maxLicenses. Sent to the customer's email with a 14-day payment deadline. When the customer pays, parent.plan + nextBillingDate are updated automatically via webhook.
send_invoice.no_customer: Parent is missing stripeCustomerId. Create a Customer in Stripe Dashboard and PATCH stripeCustomerId first.
send_invoice.no_licenses: Parent is missing maxLicenses (≥ 1 required). Set it first via PATCH.
send_invoice_tab.heading: Send test invoice — from Test Tools
send_invoice_tab.description: Pick a B2B parent tenant and send a test/initial invoice. Mirrors the card on the tenant detail page but gives global access. Requires Stripe customer + at least 1 license.
send_invoice_tab.no_eligible_tenants: No B2B tenants meet the requirements (B2B parent + Stripe customer + ≥1 license). Create a B2B tenant in the B2B tab or sync Stripe first.
am_admin_notes.locked_hint: Unlock Master Password first to view or edit admin notes for this employee.
am_admin_notes.placeholder: Private note about this employee (visible only to am-admins, end-to-end encrypted).
am_admin_notes.error_decrypt_failed: Failed to decrypt note. MPW might be wrong.
am_admin_notes.corrupt_warning: An existing note was found, but it is corrupt and cannot be read. You can write a new one — it will overwrite the corrupted note.
am_admin_notes.confirm_delete: Delete the note for this employee permanently?
am_admin_backup.heading: Backup export
am_admin_backup.description: Download a backup file with the employee list, admin notes and license info. Notes are decrypted locally with your MPW before being written to file.
welcome_b2b.heading: You are in full control of your passwords.
welcome_b2b.invited_by_suffix: Here is what you should know before continuing:
welcome_b2b.bullet1_title: Your employer CANNOT see your passwords
welcome_b2b.bullet1_body: Everything you store is encrypted locally on your device before it leaves your browser. Neither your employer, the am-admin nor Ko|Do can decrypt it.
welcome_b2b.bullet2_body: Only your name, email, license status and any administrative notes they themselves write about your account. NEVER your vault contents.
welcome_b2b.bullet3_title: Your master password is owned ONLY by you
welcome_b2b.bullet3_body: You set it yourself on the next step. If you lose it, no-one can recover your contents — not Ko|Do, not your employer. Choose something memorable.
welcome_b2b.bullet4_title: Backups belong to you, not the company
welcome_b2b.bullet4_body: You can export an encrypted backup any time. It works on your personal account too — the passwords are YOURS.
welcome_b2b.next_step_hint: Next step: create your master password (only you will know it)
welcome_b2b.error_invalid_url: The welcome link appears to be invalid. Please contact your employer or retry the invitation link.
am_admin_team.heading: Team administration
am_admin_team.description: Manage admins and super-admins in your organization. Welcome email is sent automatically on creation.
am_admin_team.confirm_delete: Delete admin account for {name} permanently? This cannot be undone.
am_admin_team.tooltip_last_super_admin: The last active super-admin cannot be deleted or suspended.
am_admin_team.error_last_super_admin: The last active super-admin cannot be deleted or suspended. Create a new super-admin first.
am_admin_team.error_cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account. Ask another super-admin to do it.
am_admin_team.error_cannot_suspend_self: You cannot suspend your own account.
am_admin_team.error_email_exists: An admin with this email already exists in the organization.
am_admin_team.temp_password_hint: The user is forced to change password on first login. Share the password via a secure channel.
am_admin_team.created_with_email: Admin created and welcome email sent.
am_admin_team.created_without_email: Admin created (welcome email was not sent — share the password manually).
am_admin_team.temp_password_warning: Save the password now if email wasn't sent — it won't be shown again.
am_admin_org_info.heading: Org info
am_admin_org_info.description: Read-only. To change contact info, contact Ko|Do support.
am_admin_employees.description_under: Active employees and pending invitations under
am_admin_employees.seats_full_tooltip: All licenses are in use (active + pending). Delete a pending invitation or expand the license to invite more.
am_admin_employees.filter_placeholder: Search by name, email or subdomain…
am_admin_settings.title: Settings
am_admin_settings.billing_section_help: Plan, next renewal and license usage for the organization.
am_admin_settings.ui_locale_help: Affects the language of the Console UI. Saved locally on this device.
am_admin_settings.org_locale_help: Used as default when invitation and welcome emails are sent without explicit language.
am_admin_settings.bg_overlay_help: How much the background is darkened. 0 % = original, 80 % = nearly black.
am_admin_settings.bg_tiles_help: 9 tiles: 3 gradients + 6 images. Saved locally on this device.
am_admin_settings.password_section_help: Change your admin password. Requires at least 12 characters and strength ≥ 2.
am_admin_settings.mpw_section_help: MPW is required to unlock admin notes and encrypted backups. Cannot be recovered if lost.
am_admin_settings.logout_all_help: Ends all active sessions for your account (including this device). You will need to log in again.
am_admin_settings.logout_all_confirm: Are you sure? All your active sessions will be ended.
am_admin_settings.logout_all_success: All sessions ended — logging in again…
am_admin_settings.logout_all_failed: Could not log out all devices.
